englishDefinitions: a soul or spirit believed to have been born again in a new body after death
in some religions, a being thought to return in another life
persianTranslation: روحی که دوباره در بدنی دیگر آمده است
examples: Some people believe the child is a reincarnated spirit.
The story describes a reincarnated spirit searching for its past life.
Belief in a reincarnated spirit is common in some traditions.
